breaking.title: Yemen's Houthis launch missiles at Saudi Arabia after strikes on Sanaa airport
breaking.summary: The Iran-backed Houthis blame Saudi Arabia for the attack in Yemen's capital and say they targeted Abha airport in response.

breaking.title: India's Strong Message To Iran After Sailor's Death In Hormuz Ship Strike
breaking.summary: The attackkilledanIndiancrew member aboard the Mombasa

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Lebanon and Israel hold talks in Rome amid renewed West Asia fighting
breaking.summary: MEA summons Iranian diplomats over killing of Indian sailor in Hormuz; U.S. strikes Iran for third night as Trump says deal still 'possible'

breaking.title: Ankit Sharma murder case: Tahir Hussain and four others convicted
breaking.summary: More than six years after the deadly northeast Delhi riots of 2020, a Delhi court has delivered a key verdict in one of the most prominent cases linked to the violence. Former Aam Aadmi Party councillor Tahir Hussain and four others have been convicted in the murder of Intelligence Bureau staffer Ankit Sharma, whose death became one of the most widely discussed incidents during the riots.

breaking.title: Heavy rain collapses roof and kills 11 people in northwest Pakistan
breaking.summary: Officials in northwest Pakistan say 11 people were killed overnight when heavy rain caused the roof of a mud-brick house to collapse

breaking.title: U.S. strikes Iran for third day, will reimpose blockade
breaking.summary: President Trump said a deal with the Islamic Republic was still possible even as attacks were carried out, with Iran striking two ships in the strategic waterway and killing one crew member

breaking.title: U.S. attacks Iran and Tehran retaliates across West Asia  as both vie for control of strait
breaking.summary: The U.S. has launched more strikes on Iran after President Donald Trump said Washington is “reinstating” a blockade on Iran in the Strait of Hormuz

breaking.title: Why stock market fell today? Rising oil prices among key factors behind Rs 3 lakh crore wealth erosion
breaking.summary: Benchmark indices Sensex and Nifty fell sharply on Tuesday as soaring crude oil prices, renewed rate hike fears, weak Q1 earnings from HCL Tech, a weaker rupee and fragile global cues triggered broad-based selling.
